audit_items.proof_trace: The `_lock` field is a value-typed `pthread_mutex_t` member (line 37), so `&_lock` is always a valid non-null address on all four code paths (init, destroy, lock, unlock). There are no raw pointer dereferences (`*p` or `p->x`) anywhere in the file; `NULL` passed to `pthread_mutex_init` is a value argument to the pthread library, not dereferenced by code in this file.
